response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI infrastructure, and open-source platforms, with notable contributions at Google and Meta, but lacks explicit evidence of AI product leadership, advanced degrees in AI, or director-level strategic impact required for this role, though his entrepreneurial initiative and technical depth warrant further exploration.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure at Google and cloud-scale systems at Meta
Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit with multiple open-source AI/Geo-data platforms
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools, and infrastructure (DLang, Node.js, Kubernetes, CDK)
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or related field; only a BS in Computer Science
Lacks clear evidence of strategic AI product ownership or customer advisory experience
Current role at Google starts in 2025 (future-dated), raising credibility concerns
